text: Stepping into this brightly-lit, glass-walled space, I am surrounded by the language of research and development. The exhibit's energetic colors and modern displays spark a sense of curiosity in me. I feel both dwarfed by the technological advancements showcased and inspired by humanity's ongoing quest for knowledge. There is an undercurrent of anticipation here, as if the room itself is a threshold to new ideas waiting to be discovered.
